title: Gli imbroglioni
writer: Franco Castellano, Lucio Fulci, Mario Guerra
actors: José Luis López Vázquez, Pietro De Vico, Raimondo Vianello
plot: A day in a tribunal where the defendants are: the manager of a soccer team, charged with bribery, two Sicilians who have sold fake archaeological findings, two nuns who have offended a public servant and an industry manager.
